meta.title: Breadcrumb
meta.description: Surfaces the user's current location and offers a path back up the page hierarchy.

hero.title: Breadcrumb
hero.desc: Breadcrumb shows where the user is and provides a path back up the page hierarchy.

spec.title: Spec
spec.desc: Breadcrumb spacing is 8px between items. The current page and prior hierarchy levels differ in typography and color for clear visual separation.

itemStatus.title: Item Status
itemStatus.desc: Breadcrumb items have two states — Linked to the destination page, or Stateless. The stateless form applies when the current tab depends on a parent that doesn't have a dedicated page.

state.title: State
state.desc: Breadcrumb has 3 states — Current Page, Enabled, Disabled. Enabled and Disabled look the same visually; the cursor change is the differentiator.

pageLink.title: Page link
pageLink.desc: Breadcrumb both signals the page hierarchy and acts as a navigation control. Click an Enabled item (other than the Current Page) to navigate. Disabled items don't navigate.
